race.comment: OMAN (10) returned from a break last start with a less than impressive 12th over 1000m at Sandown-Hillside after settling well back on soft ground. She'd shown a bit of early promise and onto synthetic here can prove a big benefit. FAMOUS ROSY (2) is yet to break through after three career starts who has been thereabouts her past two. Doubt she needs to improve much to be winning. VELLURE (5) is a colt by I Am Immortal on debut for the Shane Jackson yard who has looked handy at the jumpouts, winning the latest. Should be ready to go.  PULP FRICTION (11) is a Brave Smash filly on debut for the McEvoy yard who go well here, she draws for a nice run and is worth consideration.
